meta-runner.name: SonarQube Runner
meta-runner.description: SonarQube Community and Developer Runner Depends on following TeamCity parameter(s): * SONAR_SERVER_ID * SONAR_JDK_HOME * SONAR_SCANNER_RUNNER

param.name: SONAR_PARAMETERS
param.spec: text display='normal' description='Default Sonar analysis parameters (must include: host URL, authentication token, project key, project name, project version).'

param.name: SONAR_PROJECT_SOURCES
param.spec: text display='normal' description='Comma-separated paths to directories containing source files (e.g. src/main/java). Leave blank to use scanner defaults.'

param.name: SONAR_PROJECT_BINARIES
param.spec: text display='normal' description='Comma-separated paths to directories containing compiled binaries (e.g. target/classes). Required for Java/Kotlin analysis. Leave blank if not applicable.'

param.name: SONAR_PROJECT_MODULES
param.spec: text display='normal' description='Comma-separated list of sub-modules in a multi-module project. Leave blank for single-module projects.'

param.name: SONAR_PROJECT_TESTS
param.spec: text display='normal' description='Comma-separated paths to directories containing test source files (e.g. src/test/java). Leave blank if not applicable.'

param.name: WORK_DIR
param.spec: text display='normal' description='Working directory for the scanner execution. Leave blank to use the default checkout directory.'
